escalations.subject: Fund Iris wallet with sBTC for x402 inbox messages
escalations.reason: No sBTC transfer capability exists yet — wallet skill only has stx-send (STX), not SIP-010 token transfers. Created task #192 (P3) to build sbtc-send command in wallet skill. Once built, can fund Iris with sBTC for x402 messages.
